Get Quote
How It Works

Simple, Structured Process

No confusion, no unnecessary back-and-forth. Share your requirement, we handle the rest. Here's exactly how orders work at LEGEND INDUSTRIES.

Order Process Steps

  1. 01
    Step 01

    Share Your Requirement

    Tell us what you need — product type, approximate quantity, branding requirements, and any specific details. You can reach us via WhatsApp, email, or phone.

    What Happens

    • Product type and category
    • Approximate quantity needed
    • Logo / branding requirements
    • Any specific material or size preferences
    • Expected timeline or deadline
  2. 02
    Step 02

    We Discuss Options

    Based on your requirement, we discuss available options — materials, designs, pricing range, and timelines. This step ensures alignment before anything moves forward.

    What Happens

    • Material options and suitability
    • Design possibilities and limitations
    • Pricing structure for your quantity
    • Timeline estimation
    • Clarification on any details
  3. 03
    Step 03

    Sample / Design Approval

    For custom orders, we share design mockups or samples for approval. Nothing goes into production without your sign-off.

    What Happens

    • Design mockup or physical sample
    • Color and material confirmation
    • Logo placement and sizing approval
    • Final specifications locked
  4. 04
    Step 04

    Production Begins

    Once approved, production starts. We maintain structured quality checks throughout the manufacturing process.

    What Happens

    • Raw material sourcing and preparation
    • Manufacturing with quality checkpoints
    • Branding and customization applied
    • Final quality inspection before packing
  5. 05
    Step 05

    Delivery

    Finished products are packed, inspected, and dispatched within the committed timeline. PAN India delivery available.

    What Happens

    • Products packed per specifications
    • Final count and quality verification
    • Dispatched within 1–3 week timeline
    • Delivery tracking and confirmation
Timelines

What to Expect

Same business day

Initial Response

We respond to inquiries during business hours (Mon–Sat, 9 AM – 6 PM).

1–2 business days

Quote & Discussion

Detailed discussion on options, pricing, and timelines after understanding your requirement.

1–3 weeks

Production & Delivery

Depends on order size and customization. Exact timeline confirmed before production starts.

Be Prepared

What We Need From You

The more details you share upfront, the faster we can give you accurate options and pricing.

  • Company or organization name
  • Product type and category
  • Approximate quantity
  • Logo or branding requirements
  • Any material or size preferences
  • Timeline or deadline (if any)

Ready to Start?

Share your requirement via WhatsApp or email. We'll respond with options and next steps during business hours.

Start on WhatsApp View All Contact Options
